PR surface: Source +93, Tests +71, Docs +7. Total +171 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: Partially: source inspection gives a clear current-main path showing Zalo drops quote id/body metadata before context construction. I did not establish a live current-main Zalo reproduction in this review.
